ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiment type */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature measurement */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass measurement */,
  "mass_squared" REAL /* Square of the mass measurement */,
  "mass_fourth" REAL /* Fourth power of the mass measurement */,
  "energy" INTEGER /* Energy measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_experiment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_type_id") REFERENCES experiment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiment */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiment */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_experiment_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_experiment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
